mapper.sql: l.no AS course_id, l.subject AS course_name, COALESCE(p.p_name, l.prof) AS professor, TO_CHAR(c.c_no) || '분반' AS division, l.course_type, l.credit, c.c_where AS room, c.c_max AS capacity, c.c_now AS enrolled, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cart_item ci WHERE ci.c_id = c.c_id AND ci.c_no = c.c_no) AS cart_count, ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(r.rating_overall), 1) FROM enroll e JOIN review r ON r.e_id = e.e_id WHERE e.c_id = c.c_id AND e.c_no = c.c_no ) AS rating, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enroll e JOIN review r ON r.e_id = e.e_id WHERE e.c_id = c.c_id AND e.c_no = c.c_no ) AS review_count, CASE WHEN l.is_english = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_english, CASE WHEN c.c_now >= c.c_max THEN 'FULL' WHEN c.c_max - c.c_now <= 5 THEN 'CLOSING_SOON' ELSE 'AVAILABLE' END AS seat_status, TO_CHAR(l.target_year) AS year
FROM class c JOIN lecture l ON l.no = c.c_id LEFT JOIN professor p ON p.p_id = COALESCE(c.p_id, l.p_id) WHERE c.c_status != 'CANCELLED'

AND ( #{keyword} IS NULL OR LOWER(l.subject) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(l.no) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(COALESCE(p.p_name, l.prof)) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' ) AND (#{courseMajor} IS NULL OR LOWER(l.course_major) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{courseMajor}) || '%') AND (#{courseType} IS NULL OR l.course_type = #{courseType}) AND (#{targetYear} IS NULL OR l.target_year = #{targetYear})
AND l.is_english =
1 0
AND c.c_now < c.c_max
AND l.credit IN
#{credit}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM class_time fct WHERE fct.c_id = c.c_id AND fct.c_no = c.c_no AND fct.c_day IN
#{day}
)
AND ( #{startTime} IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM class_time fct WHERE fct.c_id = c.c_id AND fct.c_no = c.c_no AND fct.c_start >= #{startTime} ) ) AND ( #{endTime} IS NULL OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM class_time fct WHERE fct.c_id = c.c_id AND fct.c_no = c.c_no AND fct.c_end <= #{endTime} ) )
AND ( SELECT AVG(r.rating_overall) FROM enroll e JOIN review r ON r.e_id = e.e_id WHERE e.c_id = c.c_id AND e.c_no = c.c_no ) >= 4
mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY rating DESC NULLS LAST, l.subject, c.c_no
ORDER BY cart_count DESC, l.subject, c.c_no
ORDER BY (c.c_max - c.c_now) DESC, l.subject, c.c_no
ORDER BY l.subject, c.c_no
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT
AND l.no = #{courseId} AND ORDER BY c.c_no FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
SELECT textbook, assignment_count, midterm_rate, final_rate, assignment_rate, attendance_rate, prerequisite, note FROM lecture WHERE no = #{courseId}
SELECT p.p_email FROM class c JOIN lecture l ON l.no = c.c_id LEFT JOIN professor p ON p.p_id = COALESCE(c.p_id, l.p_id) WHERE l.no = #{courseId} AND ORDER BY c.c_no FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
SELECT p.p_phone FROM class c JOIN lecture l ON l.no = c.c_id LEFT JOIN professor p ON p.p_id = COALESCE(c.p_id, l.p_id) WHERE l.no = #{courseId} AND ORDER BY c.c_no FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT ct.c_day AS day_of_week, ct.c_start AS start_time, ct.c_end AS end_time, c.c_where AS room FROM class c JOIN class_time ct ON ct.c_id = c.c_id AND ct.c_no = c.c_no WHERE c.c_id = #{courseId} AND ORDER BY CASE ct.c_day WHEN 'MON' THEN 1 WHEN 'TUE' THEN 2 WHEN 'WED' THEN 3 WHEN 'THU' THEN 4 WHEN 'FRI' THEN 5 WHEN 'SAT' THEN 6 ELSE 7 END, ct.c_start

SELECT r.rating_overall AS rating, CASE r.difficulty WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 'NORMAL' ELSE r.difficulty END AS difficulty, COALESCE(DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(r.pros, 4000, 1), DBMS_LOB.SUBSTR(r.advice, 4000, 1)) AS review_comment, TO_CHAR(e.e_year) || '-' || TO_CHAR(e.e_semester) AS semester, TO_CHAR(r.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at FROM review r JOIN enroll e ON e.e_id = r.e_id WHERE e.c_id = #{courseId} AND (#{division} IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(e.c_no) = #{division}) ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT c.c_no FROM class c WHERE c.c_id = #{courseId} AND c.c_status != 'CANCELLED' AND ORDER BY c.c_no FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM enroll e WHERE e.s_id = #{studentId} AND e.c_id = #{courseId} AND (#{division} IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(e.c_no) = #{division}) AND e.e_year = Date2EnrollYear(SYSDATE) AND e.e_semester = Date2EnrollSemester(SYSDATE) AND e.e_status = 'ENROLLED'

SELECT status FROM course_request cr WHERE cr.s_id = #{studentId} AND cr.c_id = #{courseId} AND (#{division} IS NULL OR TO_CHAR(cr.c_no) = #{division}) ORDER BY cr.requested_at DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
